field_values.scene_title: Establish the new status quo and set the primary mission objective.
field_values.action_summary: Tars Tarkas is proclaimed Jeddak, and Carter is elevated to Chieftain. To channel the warriors' bloodlust, Carter proposes an alliance to rescue Dejah Thoris from Zodanga.
field_values.camera_intent: Low-angle "hero" shots of the new leaders; wide shots showing the scale of the gathered warriors; medium shots of Carter's persuasive speech.
movement_notes: Regalia or markings denoting new ranks.

## Production Intent

Establish the new status quo and set the primary mission objective.

## Storyboard

Tars Tarkas is proclaimed Jeddak, and Carter is elevated to Chieftain. To channel the warriors' bloodlust, Carter proposes an alliance to rescue Dejah Thoris from Zodanga.
